decks.notes: The main strategy of this deck is to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan by using a combination of counter spells, removal, and card draw. The deck includes a mix of card advantage engines like Tablet of Discovery and Jeskai Revelation, along with removal spells like Lightning Helix and Swallowed by Leviathan. The deck also includes some mass removal options like Day of Judgment and Pyroclasm to deal with wide boards. The mana base is versatile with a mix of dual lands to ensure consistent mana production for the deck's spells.

The deck focuses on utilizing control spells and card draw to outvalue opponents and maintain board control. By using various removal spells and counterspells, paired with card draw from Tablet of Discovery and Jeskai Revelation, the deck aims to disrupt opponents' game plans while setting up its own win conditions. Twinmaw Stormbrood can provide a powerful finisher, while the diverse array of spells such as Consult the Star Charts and Broadside Barrage offer flexibility in dealing with different threats. The mana base is optimized for consistent access to all colors needed for the control strategy to succeed.

The key strategy of this deck focuses on controlling the board through a mix of counter spells, removal, and card draw. By using cards like Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Prismari Charm to dig for key pieces, while utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Traumatic Critique to deal with threats, the deck aims to maintain board control. Additionally, Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock provide additional defense, while Impractical Joke can disrupt opponents' strategies. The overall goal is to outlast opponents and win through attrition by efficiently managing resources and disrupting their game plan.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counterspells to disrupt the opponent's strategy. It also includes powerful finishers like Jeskai Revelation and Swallowed by Leviathan to close out the game once the opponent has been neutralized. The mana base is designed to support a variety of spells and ensure consistency in casting the necessary colors of mana. By efficiently managing resources and disrupting the opponent's plans, the deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver the opposition until victory is achieved.

The deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with low-cost flying creatures and using tempo plays to disrupt the opponent's strategy. By utilizing a combination of cheap creatures like Momo, Friendly Flier and disruptive spells like Get Lost, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and control the pace of the game. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Starfield Shepherd and Sage of the Skies provides ways to protect and enhance the board presence, while cards like Daydream and Practiced Offense offer additional ways to push through damage and secure victory.

The main concept of this Azorius Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of efficient creatures and disruptive spells. By establishing an early board presence with creatures like Aang, Swift Savior and Aven Interrupter, and utilizing spells like Get Lost and Seam Rip to disrupt the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to control the tempo of the game and secure victory through aggressive attacks. Cards like Quantum Riddler and Voice of Victory provide additional support and utility to the deck, ensuring flexibility in different situations.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to effectively control the game through a combination of card advantage, removal, and counter spells. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide early board presence, while Burst Lightning and Traumatic Critique help deal with opponents' threats. Opt and Sleight of Hand ensure card selection and draw consistency. Prismari Charm offers flexibility, while Get Out and Winternight Stories provide additional control options. Thundering Falls and Riverpyre Verge offer mana fixing, while Steam Vents and Spirebluff Canal provide the necessary colors for casting spells. Overall, the deck aims to outlast opponents and win through card advantage and smart plays.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and efficient creatures while maintaining a strong mana base for consistency. By utilizing cards like Badgermole Cub, Llanowar Elves, and Pawpatch Recruit, the deck aims to establish early board presence and apply pressure quickly. Cards like Brightglass Gearhulk and Sage of the Skies provide additional power and resilience to keep the pressure on. The inclusion of cards like Seam Rip and Gene Pollinator provide disruption and utility to further enhance the deck's aggression.

Utilizing a mix of creatures, removal spells, and utility lands, this Golgari Control deck aims to establish board control and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By efficiently managing resources and leveraging cards like Tragedy Feaster, Requiting Hex, and Maelstrom Pulse, the deck can dismantle opposing threats while generating incremental advantage. Cards like Duress and Shoot the Sheriff provide disruption and hand control, while Emeritus of Abundance and Keen-Eyed Curator offer additional card advantage. The deck's mana base, featuring lands like Unholy Annex and Soulstone Sanctuary, also supports resilience and flexibility in executing its control strategy.

This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and spells to deal quick and consistent damage. The focus is on tempo and efficiency, utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to control the board while developing your own threats. With a mix of evasion, card draw, and burn spells, the deck aims to maintain pressure and close out games quickly before the opponent can stabilize. Utilizing a combination of land cards and mana fixing, this deck is built to consistently hit its curve and create powerful plays.

The main concept of the deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures and apply pressure on the opponent while using efficient cantrips and burn spells to control the board and maintain tempo. The deck aims to win through a combination of early creature damage and direct burn spells to finish off the opponent. By utilizing cards like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off alongside versatile spells like Burst Lightning and Prismari Charm, the deck seeks to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize. The inclusion of bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and disruption cards like Spell Pierce provide additional disruption and protection for the aggressive game plan.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and spells. The key strategy involves using efficient creatures like Colorstorm Stallion and Slickshot Show-Off to apply pressure early on, while also utilizing spells like Burst Lightning and Opt to control the board and deal direct damage. The deck also includes cards like Boomerang Basics and Stormchaser's Talent to maintain tempo and disrupt the opponent's game plan. With a mix of creatures and spells, this deck aims to close out games swiftly before the opponent can stabilize.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on controlling the game by using a combination of counter spells, removal, and card draw. The primary strategy is to maintain board presence with cheap creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental, while disrupting the opponent's game plan with counters like Spell Snare and Spell Pierce. Sustainable card advantage is achieved through efficient draw spells like Opt and Prismari Charm. The deck also includes burn spells like Burst Lightning for additional removal and chip damage. Overall, the deck aims to outlast opponents through resource management and strategic decision-making.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing various counter spells and removal cards to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Eddymurk Crab and Traumatic Critique are used to limit the opponent's resources, while cards like Opt and Prismari Charm help with card selection and versatility. Hearth Elemental and Sunderflock provide a threat on the board while the player maintains control. The mana base allows for consistency in casting spells while maintaining access to both blue and red mana sources. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and then secure victory through its own win conditions.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly building up a wide board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast, aggressive strategy while also providing some late-game power with cards like Dyadrine and Mossborn Hydra. Erode and Earthbender Ascension serve as removal and pump spells to push through damage, while cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Lumbering Worldwagon provide additional combat tricks and resilience. The deck utilizes a mix of lands to ensure consistency and flexibility in play.

The deck focuses on quickly developing a strong board presence and overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures. It utilizes cards like Badgermole Cub, Llanowar Elves, and Sazh's Chocobo to ramp up mana and play powerful threats such as Mightform Harmonizer and Mossborn Hydra. Cards like Earthbender Ascension and Erode provide additional support to maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes synergistic cards like Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam and Bushwhack to further push damage through. Overall, the deck aims to establish dominance on the battlefield and close out the game swiftly.

The main focus of this deck is to control the board and outvalue the opponent through a combination of removal spells, card draw, and efficient creatures. By utilizing cards like Duress and Witherbloom Charm to disrupt the opponent's game plan, as well as powerful creatures like Emeritus of Abundance and Firdoch Core, the deck aims to grind out wins by generating incremental advantages and overwhelming the opponent with card advantage. Additionally, the deck incorporates lands like Unholy Annex and Multiversal Passage to provide additional utility and flexibility in various situations.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with quick and aggressive plays, utilizing cards like Elusive Otter, Slickshot Show-Off, and Burst Lightning to control the board and deal damage. By efficiently using spells and creatures, such as Eddymurk Crab and Boomerang Basics, you can maintain pressure on your opponent and push for a faster victory. The deck also includes card draw and versatility, with options like Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Secret Identity to keep your hand full and adapt to different situations. The goal is to outpace and outmaneuver your opponent to secure a win.

This deck focuses on quickly playing low-cost creatures and spells to deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. It utilizes cards like Burst Lightning, Stormchaser's Talent, and Colorstorm Stallion to control the board and push for aggressive plays. By efficiently using resources and playing proactively, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory before they can stabilize or mount a defense. The mana base is optimized for consistency and speed, ensuring that the deck can consistently execute its game plan.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent while maintaining control over the board with bounce spells and card draw. It combines cheap, efficient creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off with direct damage spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics. The deck also utilizes a variety of cantrips like Opt and Sleight of Hand to dig for key cards and maintain card advantage. The inclusion of Prismari Charm and Stormchaser's Talent provide versatility and additional damage potential, while the land base allows for smooth mana fixing.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's strategy and control the game by countering spells and removing threats. It aims to control the board by using a variety of removal spells like Burst Lightning and Traumatic Critique, while also maintaining card advantage with draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand. Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock provide a defensive wall against aggressive strategies, allowing the deck to survive until it can establish control and eventually win the game through a combination of burn spells and efficient creatures.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by using a combination of creatures with disruptive abilities and interactive spells. The main strategy involves using cards like Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while leveraging spells like Opt and Prismari Charm to maintain card advantage and control the board. The deck also includes a mix of removal spells and counterspells to deal with threats efficiently. The mana base is optimized to support the deck's color requirements and ensure consistent performance.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through various spells and creature abilities. Cards like Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide defense, while cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand help with card selection and deck manipulation. Sunderflock can be used to remove threats from the opponent's side of the field. Overall, the deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's plans and maintaining control of the game until the player can secure a win condition.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide early defense, while cards like Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Winternight Stories help dig for key pieces. Traumatic Critique and Burst Lightning offer removal options, while Spell Pierce and Spell Snare help counter opponent spells. Prismari Charm offers versatility, and Sunderflock can provide a finisher. The deck aims to outlast opponents and disrupt their game plan while setting up for a win condition.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to establish control over the game by utilizing a combination of disruptive spells and powerful creatures. Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock provide early defense, while Hearth Elemental and Colorstorm Stallion offer late-game threats. Spells such as Burst Lightning, Opt, Traumatic Critique, and Spell Snare are used to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. This deck aims to outmaneuver opponents through card advantage and tempo plays, ultimately leading to a victory by overwhelming them with efficient threats and powerful spells.

The main concept of this deck is to control and manipulate the game through a combination of creature removal, counter spells, card draw, and burn spells. The deck focuses on using cards like Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental for board control, while utilizing cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand for card advantage. Spells like Traumatic Critique and Spell Snare are used to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while Burst Lightning and Impractical Joke provide additional removal options. The deck aims to outsmart and outmaneuver the opponent through careful planning and strategic plays.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on swarming the board with efficient creatures and using combat tricks to overwhelm opponents quickly. By utilizing cards like Badgermole Cub and Pawpatch Recruit alongside buffs like Brightglass Gearhulk and Seam Rip, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain a strong board presence. With a mix of removal spells like Erode and tempo plays like Gene Pollinator, the deck has a versatile game plan that can adapt to various situations while maintaining aggressive pressure.

The deck focuses on quickly developing a strong board presence with low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, supported by power boosters such as Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful spells like Erode and Bushwhack. Additionally, the deck utilizes lands like Fabled Passage and Hushwood Verge to fix mana and ensure consistent plays. The goal is to maintain pressure and close out the game swiftly through efficient and coordinated attacks.

This deck focuses on playing efficient and aggressive creatures, such as Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, in order to apply early pressure on the opponent. By utilizing cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension, the deck aims to quickly grow its creatures and overwhelm the opponent with powerful attacks. The inclusion of cards like Mossborn Hydra and Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam provides additional threats and resilience. This deck also includes a mix of removal spells like Erode and Bushwhack to deal with opposing threats, while also ensuring mana consistency with lands like Fabled Passage and Hushwood Verge.

This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using creatures with strong abilities and power. It also includes cards that provide support and protection for the creatures, allowing them to maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck aims to quickly build a board presence and close out the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. It utilizes a combination of efficient creatures and spells to push damage through and secure victory.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Llanowar Elves and Gene Pollinator, while also utilizing cards like Quantum Riddler and Spider Manifestation to apply early pressure on the opponent. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Mockingbird, alongside powerful finishers like Craterhoof Behemoth and Brightglass Gearhulk. The deck also includes control elements like Nature's Rhythm and Seam Rip to disrupt the opponent's strategy, making it a versatile and aggressive deck that can adapt to various matchups in a Standard 1 vs 1 format.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with fast, aggressive creatures and burn spells. It aims to quickly reduce the opponent's life total by efficiently using low-cost creatures like Fanatical Firebrand and Hired Claw, while also having powerful finishers like Nova Hellkite. Burst Lightning and Scorching Shot offer direct damage capabilities to further pressure the opponent. With a mix of creature aggression and burn spells, this deck looks to maintain a strong board presence while also having the ability to close out games quickly with direct damage.
